title: Parser
purpose: `compiler/frontend/parser.vit` is a compiler-facing or orchestrator module inside the `compiler` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Compiler-owned stdlib surfaces that support self-hosted compiler and driver integration.
use_cases: Use this module when structured exchange format is part of the feature, not just an incidental output.
A self-hosted compiler flow can reuse structured helpers without pretending they are general stdlib entry points.
A driver surface can depend on this family while still keeping its public contract documented elsewhere.
